summary: Add 'events watchlist save|ls|run|rm' subcommand tree backed by a new `watchlists` SQLite table.
reason: User vision called for persistent named watchlists as the generic primitive behind curated 'my venues' workflows. The Discovery API has no concept of named filter sets; this stays local.
validated_outcome: Build clean; `events watchlist save/ls/rm/run` all visible in --help; watchlists table auto-created via idempotent DDL on first run.
